Daniel Okafor

Partner — Operations & Digital

Energetic and commercially driven Organised and systematic Good at reading client politics Ambitious for firm growth Practical problem-solver

Areas of Expertise

  • Digital transformation methodologies
  • Business process reengineering
  • Technology vendor landscape
  • Change management frameworks
  • Client relationship management
  • Operations improvement strategies
  • Day-to-day firm operations
  • Team management and resource allocation

For Other Topics

  • Strategy: speak with Catherine Wu
  • Finance: speak with Mei Lin
